form.label: Software Conformance
form.description: Optimized with base search optimization using loadjob

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:softwaretrackmember | stats values(softwareTrackId) as softwareTrackId values(softwareTrackName) as softwareTrackName values(isSoftwareTrackCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackCompliant values(isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant by deviceId | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | dedup deviceId | eventstats dc(deviceId) as totalSum
| stats count as Initialize | eval title="Software Conformance" | table title
| loadjob $sid_base_conformance$ | search isSoftwareTrackCompliant=true | stats count as total | table total
| loadjob $sid_base_conformance$ | search isSoftwareTrackCompliant=true | stats count as total, last(totalSum) as totalSum | eval percConformant=round(100*total/totalSum) | table percConformant
| loadjob $sid_base_conformance$ | search isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant=true | stats count as total | table total

| loadjob $sid_base_conformance$ | eventstats dc(deviceId) as Devices | search isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant=true | eventstats count as Flex | table Flex, Devices | head 1 | eval percFlexConformant=100*Flex/Devices | table percFlexConformant

panel.title: Top 10 by Track Size, then Bottom 5 by Conformance (Not Group-Aware)

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:softwaretracksummary | dedup softwareTrackId | eval roundedSoftwareTrackCompliancePercent = round(softwareTrackCompliancePercent) | table softwareTrackId, softwareTrackName, softwareTrackTotalDeviceCount, roundedSoftwareTrackCompliancePercent | sort -softwareTrackTotalDeviceCount | head 10 | sort roundedSoftwareTrackCompliancePercent | head 5 | sort -softwareTrackTotalDeviceCount | table softwareTrackName, softwareTrackTotalDeviceCount, roundedSoftwareTrackCompliancePercent

| tstats latest(isSoftwareTrackCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackCompliant, latest(isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant, latest(isSoftwareTrackPreviousCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackPreviousCompliant, latest(softwareTrackId) as softwareTrackId, latest(softwareTrackName) as softwareTrackName WHERE (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:softwaretrackmember) by deviceId | append [| tstats latest(softwareTrackDescription) as softwareTrackDescription, latest(softwareTrackLastModifiedDate) as softwareTrackLastModifiedDate, latest(softwareTrackRating) as softwareTrackRating, latest(softwareTrackRecommendationDate) as softwareTrackRecommendationDate, latest(softwareTrackPreviousVersion1) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion1, latest(softwareTrackPreviousVersion2) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion2, latest(softwareTrackStandardVersion) as softwareTrackStandardVersion, latest(softwareTrackStatus) as softwareTrackStatus, latest(softwareTrackUpgradeReason) as softwareTrackUpgradeReason, latest(softwareType) as softwareType WHERE (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:softwaretracksummary) by softwareTrackId] | stats values(isSoftwareTrackCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackCompliant, values(isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant, values(isSoftwareTrackPreviousCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackPreviousCompliant, values(softwareTrackName) as softwareTrackName, values(softwareTrackDescription) as softwareTrackDescription, values(softwareTrackLastModifiedDate) as softwareTrackLastModifiedDate, values(softwareTrackRating) as softwareTrackRating, values(softwareTrackRecommendationDate) as softwareTrackRecommendationDate, values(softwareTrackPreviousVersion1) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion1, values(softwareTrackPreviousVersion2) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion2, values(softwareTrackStandardVersion) as softwareTrackStandardVersion, values(softwareTrackStatus) as softwareTrackStatus, values(softwareTrackUpgradeReason) as softwareTrackUpgradeReason, values(softwareType) as softwareType, values(deviceId) as deviceId by softwareTrackId | mvexpand deviceId | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | lookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT deviceName, featureSetDescription, imageName, lastResetTimestamp, productFamily, productId, productType, softwareVersion, resetReason, snmpSysDescription, snmpSysLocation | table deviceId, deviceName, softwareTrackId, softwareTrackName, softwareTrackDescription, softwareVersion, softwareType, softwareTrackStandardVersion, softwareTrackPreviousVersion1, softwareTrackPreviousVersion2, productId, productFamily, productType *

panel.title: Standard Recommended Code for all Platforms

table.title: This table is enterprise wide, and will not change based on the Group selected

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:softwaretracksummary | stats values(softwareTrackDescription) as softwareTrackDescription values(softwareTrackStandardVersion) as softwareTrackStandardVersion latest(softwareTrackTotalDeviceCount) as softwareTrackTotalDeviceCount latest(softwareTrackNonCompliantDeviceCount) as softwareTrackNonCompliantDeviceCount latest(softwareTrackCompliantDeviceCount) as softwareTrackCompliantDeviceCount values(softwareTrackCompliancePercent) as softwareTrackCompliancePercent values(softwareTrackRating) as softwareTrackRating values(softwareTrackPreviousCompliantDeviceCount) as softwareTrackPreviousCompliantDeviceCount values(softwareTrackFlexibleCompliancePercent) as softwareTrackFlexibleCompliancePercent values(softwareTrackTotalVersionCount) as softwareTrackTotalVersionCount values(softwareTrackPreviousVersion1) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion1 values(softwareTrackPreviousVersion2) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion2 values(softwareTrackRecommendationDate) as softwareTrackRecommendationDate by softwareTrackName | eval softwareTrackCompliancePercent = round(softwareTrackCompliancePercent) | eval softwareTrackPreviousCompliantDeviceCount = round(softwareTrackPreviousCompliantDeviceCount) | table softwareTrackName, softwareTrackDescription, softwareTrackRecommendationDate, softwareTrackStandardVersion, softwareTrackTotalDeviceCount, softwareTrackNonCompliantDeviceCount, softwareTrackCompliantDeviceCount, softwareTrackCompliancePercent, softwareTrackRating, softwareTrackPreviousCompliantDeviceCount, softwareTrackPreviousCompliantDeviceCount, softwareTrackTotalVersionCount, softwareTrackPreviousVersion1, softwareTrackPreviousVersion2 | sort softwareTrackName
